The Opportunity

The audiobook gold rush is here.
Are you in?

The audiobook industry is the fastest-growing sector in all of publishing — and the window to stake your claim is wide open right now.

$14B
Global market today
22%
Annual growth rate (CAGR)
$93B
Projected market by 2034
99%
Revenue now digital

Fiction dominates. Non-fiction is surging.

Fiction commands over 60% of revenue — driven by serial fantasy, romance, and thriller audiences who listen on repeat. Non-fiction is the fastest-growing segment, as listeners turn to self-help, business, and education content on their commutes and workouts.

Smartphones unlocked a billion new listeners.

Global smartphone penetration has turned every commute, gym session, and errand run into a listening opportunity. The U.S. alone tops $2.2 billion in annual sales, and digital platforms now account for nearly every dollar of revenue — meaning distribution costs are essentially zero.

The tools to claim your share of this market used to cost tens of thousands of dollars. Not anymore.

The Problem

Publishing an audiobook used to cost a fortune

The Old Way

  • $200–$500/hr to hire a professional narrator — a full book can cost $3,000+
  • Weeks of back-and-forth with narrators, editors, and cover designers
  • Steep learning curve with DAW software, ACX specs, and platform requirements
  • 10+ separate tools — writing software, audio editor, cover designer, distributor

With Authorr AI

  • Professional AI narration — multi-voice with character voices, done in minutes
  • From idea to audiobook in under an hour — write, narrate, design, export
  • Built-in audio studio (DAW) — add music, SFX, mix tracks, no experience needed
  • One platform, 10 destinations — Audible, Spotify, Apple Books, and more

Simple 5-Step Process

Your audiobook in five steps

1

Write Your Story

Paste your manuscript or let AI generate chapters and dialogue

2

Generate Narration

Multi-voice AI assigns unique voices to each character automatically

3

Mix in the Studio

Add background music, sound effects, and mix tracks in the built-in DAW

4

Design Your Cover

AI-generated cover art styled to your genre, sized for every platform

5

Export & Publish

Download platform-ready packages and publish to Audible, Spotify & more

Everything You Need

A complete audiobook studio in your browser

AI Story Writing

Generate full chapters with multi-character dialogue, plot arcs, and genre-specific tone. Your story, amplified by AI.

Multi-Voice Narration

Assign distinct AI voices to each character. Narrator, hero, villain — each gets their own voice, automatically.

Voice Cloning

Record or upload 30 seconds of your voice and narrate your entire book in your own voice with AI voice cloning technology.

Built-in Audio Studio

Professional DAW with multi-track editing, background music, SFX library, and mixing — no downloads required.

AI Cover Art

AI generates stunning, genre-accurate covers sized for every platform — Audible, Spotify, Apple, and more.

One-Click Publishing

Platform-ready export packages for Audible/ACX, Spotify, Apple Books, Google Play, OverDrive, Kobo, and 4 more.

Got Questions?

Frequently asked questions

No equipment needed at all. Authorr AI generates narration entirely with AI voices — Grok's professional text-to-speech. If you want to use your own voice, the Voice Clone feature only needs a 30-second audio sample from any microphone, even your phone.
The Export page's "Audible / ACX" package downloads your audio with the correct filename format and includes a full ACX checklist (44.1kHz, noise floor, peak levels). We recommend running a quick normalize in free Audacity software before uploading, which takes under 2 minutes.
A short book (10,000–20,000 words) can be written, narrated, and exported in under an hour. Longer novels take longer to narrate since TTS runs in real time, but you can walk away while it processes. AI-generated chapters take about 30 seconds each.
Yes — 100%. You own your story, your narration, and your cover art. Authorr AI is a tool, not a rights holder. You can publish, sell, and monetize everything you create here freely on any platform.
Absolutely. Paste your existing manuscript into the Workspace editor and skip straight to narration and cover generation. AI writing tools are there if you want them — they're never required.
The Export page prepares platform-ready packages for Audible/ACX, Spotify, Apple Books, Google Play Books, OverDrive/Libby, Findaway Voices (40+ platforms), Kobo, Barnes & Noble Press, YouTube, and Podcast/RSS feeds. Each includes a submission notes file with the exact specs and a direct link to that platform's upload page.
Studio Setup

Recommended Microphones

Authorr AI works with any mic — but these USB options deliver pro-quality narration right out of the box. No audio interface needed.

Heads up: A microphone is only needed if you want to clone your own voice for narration. Authorr AI narrates your book automatically with professional AI voices — no mic, no recording, no setup required.

Best Starter ~$35
Fifine K669B
USB cardioid condenser. Plug-and-play, zero latency monitoring, solid for voice recording. Great entry point before committing to more.
Affiliate: Fifine Direct Program
Check Price
Plug & Play ~$50
HyperX SoloCast
Tap-to-mute, cardioid pattern, wide compatibility with Mac/PC/PS. Clean voice capture for short-form narration and chapter recordings.
Affiliate: Amazon Associates (3–4%)
View on Amazon
Dynamic USB ~$60
Maono PD200X
Dynamic cardioid USB/XLR — rejects background noise better than condensers. Perfect for home studios without acoustic treatment.
Affiliate: Amazon Associates (3–4%)
View on Amazon
Most Popular ~$130
Blue Yeti
The industry standard for content creators. Four pickup patterns, onboard gain control, headphone monitoring. Works great for multi-voice audiobooks.
Affiliate: Logitech/Impact (4–8%)
View on Amazon
15% Affiliate ~$99
RØDE NT-USB Mini
Compact studio-grade condenser. Revolution preamp, zero-latency monitoring, USB-C. Punches well above its price for audiobook narration.
Affiliate: RØDE Direct (15%)
View at RØDE
USB + XLR ~$99
Audio-Technica ATR2100x
Dynamic mic with both USB and XLR outputs — upgrade your interface later without buying a new mic. Warm, smooth voice tone.
Affiliate: Amazon Associates (3–4%)
View on Amazon
Full Featured ~$160
HyperX QuadCast S
Four pickup patterns, built-in shock mount, tap-to-mute, pop filter. RGB LED looks great on video — strong all-rounder for narrators who also stream.
Affiliate: Amazon Associates (3–4%)
View on Amazon
Top Pick + 15% ~$229
RØDE PodMic USB
Broadcast-grade dynamic USB/XLR. Built-in DSP with APHEX processing — aural exciter, compressor, noise gate. Sounds like a professional studio out of the box.
Affiliate: RØDE Direct (15%)
View at RØDE
Studio Grade + 15% ~$229
RØDE NT-USB+
Large-diaphragm condenser + APHEX DSP processing. Revolution preamp delivers studio-quality warmth and detail. The go-to for serious audiobook narrators.
Affiliate: RØDE Direct (15%)
View at RØDE
Broadcast ~$249
Shure MV7+
Dynamic USB/XLR with built-in denoiser and dual-band EQ. Broadcast-grade build, rejects room noise. Trusted by professional voice actors and podcasters worldwide.
Affiliate: Shure via Impact
View at Shure
Top of Line ~$399
Shure SM7dB
The SM7B with a built-in preamp. Used on countless platinum records and Joe Rogan's podcast. If you want the absolute best USB-compatible mic for narration, this is it.
Affiliate: Shure via Impact
View at Shure

Links above may be affiliate links — we earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. All recommendations are based on actual audio performance for narration.

Voice Cloning Station

Neural Voice Matrix

Upload voice samples to create custom AI narrator profiles

Accent tip: Grok voices don't have a built-in accent selector, but voice cloning solves this. Upload ~60 seconds of anyone speaking English with the accent you want — French, Spanish, Indian, Australian, etc. — and their accent carries over into all narration automatically.

Platform Requirements & Guidelines

Audible

  • • 2400×2400px minimum
  • • Square aspect ratio
  • • RGB color space
  • • Text must be readable at 150px

Spotify

  • • 3000×3000px recommended
  • • Square format required
  • • High contrast text
  • • No promotional text

Apple

  • • 3000×3000px minimum
  • • Square aspect ratio
  • • 72 DPI minimum
  • • Clear, legible text

Export Your Audiobook

Package Options

Complete Audiobook Package

Audio + manuscript + metadata as separate downloads

Audio Files Only

WAV audio file of your narration

Text Manuscript

Complete story text as .txt file

Manuscript (.docx — Shunn)

Industry-standard Shunn format. 12pt TNR, double-spaced, 1" margins, chapter page-breaks, running header.

Narration Script (.pdf)

Single Narrator: numbered paragraphs + pacing notes. Multi-Voice: CHARACTER: prefixes, stage cues, full cast list.

TTS Routing Manifest (.json)

Machine-readable segments: {order, speaker_id, voice_id, text, emotion, chapter, scene} for automated multi-voice audio pipelines.

Support & Resources

Processing...

Voice Cloning — Biometric Data Notice

Required consent before collecting voice data

Your voice recording constitutes biometric data under Illinois BIPA, Texas CUBI, California AB 2602, and similar laws. Please read and acknowledge the disclosures below before proceeding.

1

What is collected

An audio recording (~30 seconds) you upload or record. This is transmitted to xAI, Inc. to generate a synthetic voice model. Authorr AI does not store the raw audio on its servers.

2

Purpose

Solely to create a personal AI voice model for use within Authorr AI narration. Your biometric data will not be sold or used for advertising.

3

Retention & deletion

The voice model ID is stored only in your browser. You may delete your Voice Clone at any time — we will instruct xAI to delete the model.

4

Third-party voices

You may only clone your own voice, or a voice for which you have obtained explicit written consent from that person. Cloning someone else's voice without consent may violate federal and state law.
